scripts.db:migrate: cd packages/db && pnpm dlx prisma migrate deploy && cd ../../
scripts.db:generate: cd packages/db && pnpm dlx prisma generate && cd ../../
scripts.web:start: pnpm run db:migrate && cd apps/web && pnpm run start
scripts.backend:start: pnpm run db:migrate && cd apps/backend && pnpm run start
scripts.websocket:start: pnpm run db:migrate && cd apps/websocket && pnpm run start
